cells.rationale: Schema-bumping rewinding migration plus a polarity-aware fold gate whose re-fold determinism and DELETE-list correctness are sacred contract surfaces where a wrong abstraction corrupts every projection.

Smaller but still fold-contract work - a new discriminated event_type composing with the stamp helper and subagent-yield guard where re-fold determinism and equal-ts tie semantics are intelligence-sensitive.

Multi-surface producer-side sentinel with synthetic corrective events, change-gated sticky-until-ack distress rows, and injected clock/liveness probes - high blast radius contract work where a false-positive stop or double-producer race is costly.
